---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens.

## Environment

- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 124, Firefox 126, Safari 17)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 15, Windows 11)
- **KyberStation version**: (e.g., v0.1.0, or commit hash)

## Relevant Package

Which part of KyberStation is affected?

- [ ] `apps/web` — Editor UI
- [ ] `packages/engine` — Blade simulation
- [ ] `packages/codegen` — Code generation
- [ ] `packages/presets` — Preset library
- [ ] `packages/sound` — Sound font playback
- [ ] `packages/boards` — Board profiles
- [ ] Unsure

## Screenshots / Console Errors

If applicable, paste screenshots or browser console output.

## Generated Code (if codegen bug)

If the bug is in generated ProffieOS code, paste:
- The style settings you configured
- The generated code output
- What the code should have been (if you know)
